patches.hypothesis: The original patch only handled the case where there is one node, leading to overfitting. The refined patch will handle cases with zero nodes, one node, and multiple nodes. It will also ensure proper handling of boundary conditions and null checks.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug arises when trying to build a COMMA tree with fewer than two nodes, causing an IndexOutOfBoundsException. The fix involves ensuring there are at least two nodes before constructing the COMMA tree.
